forecasts.detailed: Patchy drizzle between midnight and 2am, then scattered rain showers between 2am and 3am, then rain showers likely and patchy fog. Cloudy, with a low around 43. East wind 0 to 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

Rain showers. Cloudy, with a low around 48. South wind 6 to 9 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.
